description:
This image is a screenshot of the European Environment Agency (EEA) EIONET Data Dictionary web interface, specifically showing the details for "Vocabulary: EAGLE Nomenclature". The page displays navigation elements on the left and content details on the right.

The top header includes the "European Environment Agency" logo, a "Login" link, a printer icon, an export icon, and a link to the "Eionet portal". Breadcrumbs at the top of the main content area indicate the navigation path: "You are here: Eionet >> Data Dictionary >> Vocabulary".

The left navigation panel, with "Vocabularies" highlighted in yellow, lists the following links:
*   Help and documentation
*   Datasets
*   Tables
*   Data elements
*   Schemas
*   Vocabularies
*   Services
*   Namespaces

The main content area is titled "Vocabulary: EAGLE Nomenclature". Below the title, there are navigation links "Back to set" and "Exports". The core information about the EAGLE Nomenclature is presented in a tabular format with the following fields and values:
*   **Folder:** landcover (Landcover nomenclatures)
*   **Identifier:** eagle
*   **Label:** EAGLE Nomenclature
*   **Base URI:** https://dd.eionet.europa.eu/vocabulary/landcover/eagle/
*   **Registration status:** Public draft 04 Nov 2021 15:54:57
*   **Type:** Common
*   **Version:** 3.1.2
